name: AppWindow
description: Draggable glassmorphic window container with Monolith CRT aesthetic

id.description: Unique window identifier for state management

title.description: Window title displayed in the taskbar

defaultSize.description: Initial window size (auto-sizes to content if not provided)

resizable.description: Enable window resizing via edge handles

actionButton.description: Optional action button in the taskbar

examples.name: Window with action button
examples.code:
<AppWindow
  id="prizes"
  title="Prizes"
  actionButton={{
    text: "Order a Seeker",
    href: "https://store.solanamobile.com/",
    target: "_blank"
  }}
>
  <PrizeList />
</AppWindow>
